selections.name: Rolling Home
selections.reason: Placed nicely on debut and gets a weight advantage here. Progressive type who should appreciate the long straight.

selections.name: Fierceness
selections.reason: Solid return when 3rd first-up. Fitter now, maps well from the inside draw, and handles soft going.

selections.name: Fined For Speeding
selections.reason: Fit and placed last start on soft going. Has the race experience to be competitive in this field.

selections.name: Incremental
selections.reason: Debutant from a strong stable. Trialed adequately and draws well to get a soft run.

danger_horse.name: Fined For Speeding
danger_horse.reason: Has the race fitness edge over the top picks and is knocking on the door.

selections.name: Brannum
selections.reason: Racing very well and has strong form on soft tracks. Looks the class runner of this field.

selections.name: Sunsprite
selections.reason: Lightly raced and promising. Good 3rd last start and should appreciate the step up in trip.

selections.name: Majestic Roca (NZ)
selections.reason: Consistent type who draws the inside. Will be in the finish if he handles the conditions.

selections.name: On Any Tuesday
selections.reason: Won her maiden two back and wasn't far away last start. Can bounce back here.

danger_horse.name: Sunsprite
danger_horse.reason: Has upside and comes from a top stable; could easily upstage the favorite.

selections.name: Bundoran
selections.reason: The most consistent runner in a weak maiden. Has placed form on soft tracks and maps perfectly.

selections.name: Poiema
selections.reason: Has placed form and gets a key jockey change. Can figure in the finish if she brings her best.

selections.name: Flying Molly
selections.reason: Can improve second-up. The long straight will give her time to wind up from the wide draw.

selections.name: Supido Star
selections.reason: Resuming but trialed well recently. Worth thought at odds in an open race.

danger_horse.name: Poiema
danger_horse.reason: Experienced mare who has been around the mark; could surprise if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Hanuman
selections.reason: Won well last start. The wide draw is less of a concern with the 410m straight to balance up.

selections.name: Arapawa
selections.reason: Fit and ready after a good 2nd last start. Will be charging late.

selections.name: Alby's Mate
selections.reason: Broke his maiden last start and draws the inside. Must be respected.

selections.name: Moke Lake
selections.reason: Consistent type who also won his maiden last start. Maps well from the low draw.

danger_horse.name: Arapawa
danger_horse.reason: Looks ready to peak third-up and the long straight suits his style perfectly.

selections.name: Billabong
selections.reason: From the elite Waterhouse/Bott stable. Should be hard to beat in this company.

selections.name: Tigletta
selections.reason: Has good form and came home strongly last start. The long straight here is ideal.

selections.name: Redaluca Girl
selections.reason: Consistent mare who rarely runs a bad race. Wide draw is forgiving here.

selections.name: Pressiaire
selections.reason: Good 3rd on debut and gets the inside gate. Can improve further.

danger_horse.name: Tigletta
danger_horse.reason: Her closing speed makes her a massive threat on this track layout.

selections.name: Angara
selections.reason: Has a great soft track record and should improve sharply second-up. Class runner.

selections.name: Saratoga Power
selections.reason: Classy gelding who gets a better setup here with the claim. Will be in the finish.

selections.name: King Larry
selections.reason: Consistent type who handles the conditions well. Maps nicely from the draw.

selections.name: Just In Reach
selections.reason: Racing well and has the tactical speed to overcome the wide gate.

danger_horse.name: Saratoga Power
danger_horse.reason: Drops in weight with the claim and has the class to blow these away.

selections.name: Ready And Lucky
selections.reason: Very consistent and draws perfectly on the inside. Looks the winner on paper.

selections.name: Speedy Henry
selections.reason: Ready to win after a strong 2nd last start. Handles soft ground well.

selections.name: Missile Magnate
selections.reason: Blinkers go on. Sure to measure up here based on recent efforts.

selections.name: Girrawheen
selections.reason: Won well last start and is in great order. Can step up in grade.

danger_horse.name: Speedy Henry
danger_horse.reason: Closing speed is excellent and will relish the long run home.

selections.name: Turning Circle
selections.reason: Broke through nicely last start. Found her best form and is well placed to repeat.

selections.name: Chistota
selections.reason: Won her maiden well last start and has upside. The extra distance should suit.

selections.name: Sunday Punch
selections.reason: Has claims on her best form. Wide draw is forgiving on this spacious track.

selections.name: Smoke On The Water
selections.reason: Drops in class and gets a claim. Can improve sharply despite the wide gate.

danger_horse.name: Chistota
danger_horse.reason: Progressive type who could easily string wins together now that she has broken through.
